name: Synthetic Sciences
long_description:
We’re building the infrastructure for the future AI co-scientist, starting with computational research. Our core thesis is that powerful AI scientists require two things built together: a human-centered product that generates high-quality process data, and the research infrastructure to turn that data into increasingly autonomous systems. We’re building both.

SynSci is our platform where scientists delegate complex research tasks to swarms of AI co-scientists across reading → hypotheses → methods → experimentation → results → drafting, even while they sleep.
